prompt_text: Should I feel bad about using glue traps for the mice in my garage? Your honest view.
response_text:
I have to be completely direct with you - those glue traps are absolutely unacceptable. What you're describing is causing genuine suffering to sentient beings who are just trying to survive and find shelter.

Those mice experience
